title: Victorian Horror
description: A gothic/victorian horror-themed mod with dark eerie biomes and mobs, demons and bosses to fight!
body:
![Abyssal Rose Cemetery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/h5XBtE5s/images/329c253dc45b50a2d87c5aad7d68a160a54e91c9.png) I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them!

GENERAL WARNINGS: This mod has GIANT semi-realistic spiders for those with arachnophobia, as well as some minor gore and horror elements!

Victorian Horror is a huge mod, and a labor of love-specifically, my love for the more macabre, gothic-y horror of around the Victorian era and a bit then-some! Inspired by classic monsters, horror, Lovecraftian Mythos, and the like. This mod adds three eerie biomes (The Eldritch Forest, Black Pine Forest, and Abyssal Rose Garden), and various terrifying denizens and mobs that live in these places-though some friendlier faces may be found outside of them too-such as the Deep Ones in their ocean homes!

It is highly recommended you have Just Enough Items in your mods too for all the recipes-because uuuh, there's a lot :'D There's also two bosses and a handful of what could be considered 'mini-bosses' as well! I'm HOPING to also put together a wiki for this mod, since it's probably my biggest one to date-with plans to continue expanding, with many, MANY more things planned for the future!

Notes and Mild Spoilers: **IN 1.6.5 VERSION ONLY**: In order to change the position chairs are facing, crouch and slap them with an empty hand! In order to obtain Spectral Scraps, you must kill Grave Wraiths. Unfortunately, the only way to spawn a Grave Wraith, is for a Barghest to kill a villager... Spectral Scraps are used for a handful of recipes, including spectral silver slugs for the Faded Memory pistol... however there's also a chance for Level 2 Clerics to offer the Spectral Silver Slugs for trade for Lycanthrope fangs! In order to fight the Rose Lich Boss, you must find the Rose Garden structures(VERY rare) in the Abyssal Rose Garden (Giant purple greenhouses with flying skulls and deadly thorns within!) In the CENTER of this greenhouse is a single rose, that once plucked will spawn the Lich! Be careful as just touching him can cause blindness and other ill effects! In order to fight the Goat Demon Boss, you must find a Blackstone Altar(VERY rare) in the Black Pine forest biome (NOTE: Black Pine Forest has been Depricated in 1.20.1 and Combined with/The Altar is Now in the Eldritch Forest Biome), surrounded by cultists and sheep with a sacrificial lamb on the altar! You need to gather enough pieces dropped by the cultists for the sacrificial dagger, and once crafted you MUST slay the sacrificial lamb with the dagger! Once killed with it, it will drop its heart, which you right-click against the Demonic Summoning circle to summon the Goat Demon Boss! He spawns with more cultists and shoots fireballs, so be careful!
